banner.short: PVC banners printed to size, hemmed and eyeleted.
banner.long: Durable PVC banners for indoor and outdoor use. Printed at high resolution and finished with hemmed edges and brass eyelets every 50 cm. Max width 160 cm.

mesh-banner.short: Wind-through mesh banners for outdoor and scaffolding use.
mesh-banner.long: Printed mesh banners allow wind to pass through — ideal for scaffolding, fences, and exposed outdoor locations. Finished with hemmed edges and brass eyelets. Max width 160 cm.

construction-banner.short: Heavy-duty banners for construction sites, scaffolding, and fencing.
construction-banner.long: Construction banners printed on reinforced PVC or mesh material. UV and weather resistant. Finished with hemmed edges and reinforced eyelets for secure mounting on scaffolding, fences, and hoardings.

rollup-banner.short: Vertical rollup-format PVC banners — print only, no stand.
rollup-banner.long: Printed PVC banners in tall rollup proportions. Print only — no stand. Suitable as replacement graphics for existing roll-up stands, or free-hanging banners. Max width 160 cm.

event-banner.short: Large-format PVC banners for events, trade shows, and outdoor advertising.
event-banner.long: Full-colour event banners printed on durable PVC. Hemmed and eyeleted. Suitable for festivals, trade shows, storefronts, and outdoor promotions. Custom sizes available.

backlit-banner.short: Backlit banner film for illuminated lightboxes and frames.
backlit-banner.long: High-clarity backlit film for lightbox and LED display panels. Vibrant, evenly backlit colours. Suitable for retail lightboxes, exhibition displays, and illuminated signage.

blockout-banner.short: Opaque blockout PVC banner — double-sided, no light bleed.
blockout-banner.long: Blockout PVC banner with an opaque black centre layer that prevents light from passing through. Ideal for double-sided printing where backlit bleed must be eliminated.

barrier-fence-banner.short: Printed banner for crowd control barriers, events and construction sites.
barrier-fence-banner.long: Durable printed banners designed to attach to crowd control barriers and construction fencing. Weather-resistant material with eyelets for easy attachment.

backlit-film.short: Backlit film for lightbox displays and illuminated signs.
backlit-film.long: High-clarity backlit film for lightbox and LED display panels. Vibrant, evenly backlit colours. Suitable for retail lightboxes, exhibition displays, and illuminated signage. Max width 160 cm.

roll-up.short: Retractable roll-up banner stands — print, assemble, display.
roll-up.long: High-quality retractable roll-up banner stands for trade shows, events, retail, and offices. Print is included — just upload your artwork. Available in two widths. Assembled and ready to use.

rollup-85.short: Retractable 85×200 cm roll-up stand — print, pole and carry bag included.
rollup-85.long: Standard retractable roll-up display 85 cm wide × 200 cm tall. High-quality print included. Comes with aluminium pole, carry bag, and assembled base. Ready to use straight out of the box.

rollup-100.short: Wide 100×200 cm roll-up stand — maximum visibility, print included.
rollup-100.long: Wide-format retractable roll-up display 100 cm wide × 200 cm tall. Maximum print area for high-impact display. Includes aluminium pole, carry bag, and assembled base.

rollup-outdoor.short: Double-sided outdoor roll-up with water tank base — wind-stable, both sides printed.
rollup-outdoor.long: Heavy-duty outdoor roll-up stand with a weighted water tank base for wind stability. Both sides printed. Suitable for exterior entrances, events, and outdoor promotions.

x-banner.short: Freestanding X-frame display — lightweight, fast to set up.
x-banner.long: X-frame banner stands for indoor events, trade shows, and retail. Lightweight aluminium frame with printed banner included. Quick to assemble, easy to transport. Available in 60×160 cm and 80×180 cm.

l-banner.short: Slim L-frame display stands — economical and eye-catching.
l-banner.long: L-frame banner displays — a simple, economical alternative to roll-ups. Lightweight aluminium frame with printed banner. Available in 60×160 cm and 80×200 cm. No cassette mechanism — banner attaches with clips.

kundestopper.short: A-frame pavement signs — double-sided, printed and ready.
kundestopper.long: Double-sided A-frame pavement signs in A1 or A2 format. Durable aluminium frame with printed inserts included. Ideal for entrances, pavements, and retail environments. Folds flat for storage.

stickers.short: Full-colour print & cut stickers. Any shape, any size.
stickers.long: Full-colour stickers printed on premium vinyl and cut to your shape. Available in matte or gloss lamination. Waterproof, UV-resistant, and suitable for both indoor and outdoor use.

sticker.short: Custom stickers printed to your design — any size, any shape.
sticker.long: Full-colour printed stickers on premium self-adhesive material. Available in standard cut or contour cut. Gloss or matte finish. Durable and waterproof.

magnetfolie.short: Printed magnetic foil — flexible, removable, repositionable.
magnetfolie.long: Full-colour print on flexible magnetic foil. Easily repositionable and leaves no residue. Ideal for vehicles, refrigerators, whiteboards, and metal surfaces. Max width 100 cm.

car-magnet.short: Magnetic car signs — attach and remove in seconds.
car-magnet.long: Full-colour printed magnetic car signs. Strong enough to stay on at motorway speed. Ideal for business vehicles, temporary branding, and event promotion. Max width 100 cm.

car-magnet-schild.short: Pre-cut magnetic door signs with rounded corners.
car-magnet-schild.long: Full-colour magnetic door signs pre-cut to common car door formats. Rounded corners prevent lifting at speed. Supplied in pairs. Printed on 0.8 mm magnetic material.

milchglasfolie.short: Frosted glass film — privacy and style for windows and glass doors.
milchglasfolie.long: Self-adhesive frosted glass film printed with your design. Provides privacy while letting light through. Ideal for office partitions, shop windows, and glass doors. Max width 137 cm.

lochfolie.short: Perforated window film — see-through from inside, opaque outside.
lochfolie.long: Printed perforated vinyl film (50/50). Full-colour print visible from outside; transparent from inside. Ideal for shop windows and vehicle rear windows. Max width 137 cm.

pvc-folie.short: Self-adhesive PVC film — for windows, walls, and smooth surfaces.
pvc-folie.long: Premium self-adhesive PVC film for indoor and outdoor use. Waterproof, UV-resistant, and easy to apply. Available in gloss or matte. Max width 137 cm.

forex-board.short: Lightweight PVC foam board for indoor signs and displays.
forex-board.long: Printed directly onto white forex (PVC foam board). Lightweight, rigid, and easy to mount. Suitable for indoor signs, displays, posters, and point-of-sale. Available in 3 mm and 5 mm thickness.

dibond-sign.short: Aluminium composite panel for outdoor and long-lasting signage.
dibond-sign.long: Printed on dibond (aluminium composite panel). Weather-resistant, UV-stable, and rigid. Ideal for outdoor signs, building fascia, and long-term displays.

acrylic-sign.short: Premium glossy acrylic signs — vibrant colour, premium look.
acrylic-sign.long: Printed on clear or white acrylic. High-gloss surface gives vivid colour reproduction. Ideal for reception signs, office decor, and premium retail displays.

photo-print-large.short: Large format photo prints — vivid colours on premium paper or film.
photo-print-large.long: High-resolution large format photo prints on premium glossy or matte material. Suitable for photography, art prints, exhibitions, and interior decoration. Max width 160 cm.

vinyl-lettering.short: Precision-cut vinyl letters and shapes. Choose your colour.
vinyl-lettering.long: Single-colour vinyl lettering cut on our precision plotter. Supplied pre-masked and ready to apply. Ideal for shop windows, vehicles, walls, and equipment.

dtf.short: DTF transfers printed and cut to size — heat-press at home or in production.
dtf.long: Full-colour direct-to-film (DTF) transfers. We print and cut — you heat-press onto any fabric. Works on cotton, polyester, nylon, and blends. Suitable for small runs.

dtf-transfer.short: DTF transfers printed and cut to size — heat-press at home or in production.
dtf-transfer.long: Full-colour direct-to-film (DTF) transfers. We print and cut — you heat-press onto any fabric. Works on cotton, polyester, nylon, and blends. Suitable for small runs.

dtf-gang-sheet.short: DTF gang sheets — fill the 55 cm roll, cut to size, heat-press your prints.
dtf-gang-sheet.long: Gang up multiple designs on a single 55 cm wide DTF roll to minimise waste. You specify the width and height of the film area. We print and cut — you heat-press onto any fabric. Vibrant colours, soft hand feel.

dtf-55x100.short: Full-size DTF gang sheet 55×100 cm — transfer up to 12 standard designs in one go.
dtf-55x100.long: Maximum size DTF sheet at 55×100 cm. Fit multiple designs, minimise waste, and heat-press individually. Works on cotton, polyester, nylon, and blends.

dtf-a3.short: DTF gang sheet A3 (29.7×42 cm) — ideal for 4–6 medium prints.
dtf-a3.long: A3 format DTF transfer sheet. Gang up medium-size designs to maximise print area. Works on all common fabrics. Supplied ready to cut and press.

dtf-a4.short: DTF gang sheet A4 (21×29.7 cm) — perfect for small designs or single prints.
dtf-a4.long: A4 format DTF transfer sheet. Ideal for a single chest print or a few small designs. Works on all common fabrics. Supplied ready to cut and press.

flex-print.short: Heat-transfer flex vinyl — bright, durable single-colour prints.
flex-print.long: Flex vinyl heat transfers for textiles. High opacity, single-colour. Suitable for sports kits, workwear, and promotional wear. Wash-resistant at 60°C. Max width 50 cm.

flock-print.short: Flock heat transfers — soft, velvety finish for premium textiles.
flock-print.long: Flock heat-transfer material for textiles. Creates a soft, raised velvety surface. Ideal for premium fashion and workwear. Single-colour. Max width 50 cm.

embroidery.short: Machine embroidery on garments — flat, 3D, or patch.
embroidery.long: High-quality machine embroidery on your garments. Choose between flat embroidery, 3D puff embroidery, or patch application. Pricing based on stitch count. Send your garment or order with ours.

patches.short: Custom embroidered patches — iron-on, velcro, or sew-on.
patches.long: Custom machine-embroidered patches. Choose your border type and backing. Suitable for jackets, bags, hats, and uniforms. Min order 10 pieces.

mug.short: Sublimation mugs printed with your design — full wrap, vibrant colour.
mug.long: Full-colour sublimation mugs with your artwork printed all the way around. Dishwasher-safe coating, vivid and durable colours. Standard 330 ml ceramic mug.
